title: Refreshed Lighting
description: adds colored lighting and makes the night darker
body:
## Adds Colored Lighting & Darker Night

![night](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00bfea26c1ac1bb97f6d833e96e417fa3390420a.png)

### Overview:
> This resource pack changes Minecraft’s lighting to create a more immersive atmosphere. It adds color to lighting, darkens shadows, and makes nights darker.

### Recommended Settings:
> For the best experience, set your in-game brightness to 0% (Moody)


### Features:

- Adds subtle color to in-game lighting (no more plain white light).
  
- Darkens shadows for a more atmospheric look.
  
- Makes night significantly darker and more immersive.
  
- Changes lighting in other dimensions

- changes rain

> ![Required Mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a1a82716a413eefe336b5526dd44f45ff14b4e15.png)
